option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox fx:id="sidebarRoot" prefWidth="260.0" spacing="4.0" styleClass="sidebar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.SidebarController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0" styleClass="sidebar-brand"> <Label styleClass="brand-dot" text="*" /> <Label styleClass="brand-label" text="Artium" /> </HBox>
<Button fx:id="dashboardButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDashboardClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Tableau de bord" />
<Button fx:id="usersGroupButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onUsersGroupClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Utilisateurs" /> <VBox fx:id="usersSubMenu" spacing="3.0" styleClass="sub-menu"> <Button fx:id="artistesButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onArtistesClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Artistes" /> <Button fx:id="amateursButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAmateursClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Amateurs" /> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="oeuvresButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onOeuvresClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Oeuvres" /> <Button fx:id="livresButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLivresClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Bibliotheque" /> <Button fx:id="musiquesButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onMusiquesClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Musique" />
<Button fx:id="eventsGroupButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEventsGroupClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Evenements" /> <VBox fx:id="eventsSubMenu" spacing="3.0" styleClass="sub-menu"> <Button fx:id="evenementsButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEvenementsClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Evenements" /> <Button fx:id="galeriesButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onGaleriesClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Galeries" /> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="reclamationsButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onReclamationsClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Reclamations" />
<Region fx:id="sidebarSpacer" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox fx:id="sidebarRoot" prefWidth="260.0" spacing="4.0" styleClass="sidebar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.SidebarController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0" styleClass="sidebar-brand"> <ImageView fitHeight="44.0" preserveRatio="true"> <Image url="@images/Colored PNG White Logo.png" /> </ImageView> </HBox>
<Button fx:id="dashboardButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDashboardClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Tableau de bord" />
<Button fx:id="usersGroupButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onUsersGroupClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Utilisateurs" /> <VBox fx:id="usersSubMenu" spacing="3.0" styleClass="sub-menu"> <Button fx:id="artistesButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onArtistesClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Artistes" /> <Button fx:id="amateursButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAmateursClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Amateurs" /> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="oeuvresButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onOeuvresClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Oeuvres" /> <Button fx:id="livresButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLivresClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Bibliotheque" /> <Button fx:id="musiquesButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onMusiquesClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Musique" />
<Button fx:id="eventsGroupButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEventsGroupClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Evenements" /> <VBox fx:id="eventsSubMenu" spacing="3.0" styleClass="sub-menu"> <Button fx:id="evenementsButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEvenementsClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Evenements" /> <Button fx:id="galeriesButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onGaleriesClick" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="nav-sub-item" text="Galeries" /> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="reclamationsButton" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onReclamationsClick" prefHeight="38.0" styleClass="nav-item" text="Reclamations" />
<Region fx:id="sidebarSpacer" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" /> </VBox>
